templates.name: Antonio Paving
templates.subject: Paving & Bricklaying Subcontractor — Antonio PrimeScape, Notting Hill
templates.body:
Hi there,

I'm Antonio, owner of Antonio PrimeScape Construction — a Melbourne paving, bricklaying, decking and landscaping company based in Notting Hill. We've been operating since 2014, we're fully insured ($20M public liability, ABN 39 104 568 456), and we have 63 five-star Google reviews.

We work directly with builders and construction companies across Melbourne's south-east and beyond, handling all types of site work:

🧱  PAVING
• Brick paving — clay & concrete pavers, herringbone, basket weave, running bond
• Concrete paving — exposed aggregate, coloured, stamped, plain
• Crazy paving / flagstone — natural stone, slate, sandstone
• Pool paving — travertine, porcelain, non-slip coping
• Porcelain paving — large format, outdoor rated, pedestal or adhesive
• Bluestone paving — $120–$200/m²
• Driveways, pathways, patios, alfresco — residential & commercial

🏡  DECKING & LANDSCAPING
• Timber decking — Merbau, spotted gum, composite, hardwood
• Retaining walls, garden edging, turf, planting
• Complete landscape packages — design to completion

🧱  BRICKLAYING
• Carcass brickwork — house frames, extensions, garages, commercial
• Brick fire pits, outdoor kitchens, BBQ areas
• Brick fences, feature walls, letterboxes, pillars

🏆  WHY BUILDERS CHOOSE US
✓ Written fixed-price quotes — we visit the site first, no phone guesstimates
✓ $20M public liability insurance — cert available on request
✓ 63 ★★★★★ Google reviews — https://goo.gl/JTJ67w9u1ZPnPgoJ7
✓ Owner-operated — Antonio manages every job personally, no subcontractor roulette
✓ 10+ years in Melbourne — local to the SE suburbs, based in Notting Hill
✓ 500+ projects completed across Melbourne

If you have an upcoming project — new build, extension, or commercial job — I'll come to site within 48 hours and have a fixed-price quote ready. No obligation.

See our full services & gallery:
🔗 https://antoniopaving.com
📞 Antonio: 0406 170 544
📍 10 Elwood St, Notting Hill VIC 3168

Best regards,
Antonio
Owner — Antonio PrimeScape Construction
ABN 39 104 568 456

templates.name: Prime Property Maintenance
templates.audience: Real Estate Agents, Property Managers & Strata
templates.subject: Property Maintenance in Melbourne SE — Quotes in 2 Hours, Prime Property
templates.body:
Hi there,

I'm writing from Prime Property Maintenance — a Melbourne-based maintenance team based in Notting Hill, covering the south-eastern suburbs. We work with real estate agencies, property managers and strata committees to keep rental and commercial properties in top shape.

We're fully insured ($20M public liability) with real photos of real jobs — no stock imagery.

HERE'S WHAT WE DO:

DECKING
• New deck builds — timber (Merbau, spotted gum) & composite
• Deck oiling, staining, restoration
• Deck cleaning & pressure washing

FENCING
• Fence repairs & replacements — timber, Colorbond, paling
• New fence installation
• Gate repairs & new gates

GARDENING & LAWN
• Lawn mowing & edging — regular or one-off
• Garden maintenance, pruning & weeding
• Garden clean-ups & green waste removal
• Hedge & shrub trimming

CLEANING
• Gutter cleaning & minor gutter repairs
• Pressure washing — driveways, paths, walls, decks, fences

PROPERTY MAINTENANCE
• Handyman services — general repairs, tap washers, door fixes, painting
• End-of-lease preparation — bond-back guaranteed quality
• Pre-sale preparation — present properties at their best
• Commercial & warehouse maintenance
• Ongoing property maintenance contracts — we handle it all

REMOVALS & ASSEMBLY
• Furniture & IKEA / flat-pack assembly
• Small removals & courier pickups
• Rubbish removal

🏆  WHY PROPERTY MANAGERS TRUST US
✓ Quote in 2 hours — we know tenants can't wait days
✓ Fixed pricing — no surprises, no call-out fees
✓ $20M public liability insurance
✓ Real before & after photos — see our actual work
✓ End-of-lease specialists — done right, first time
✓ Local — Notting Hill VIC 3168, covering SE suburbs
✓ 63 ★★★★★ reviews on Google — https://goo.gl/bQqrPoEaNtabbsoz5

We're taking on new property portfolios. Reply or call for a free quote.

See full services:
🔗 https://primepropertymaintenance.au
📞 0468 166 249
✉️ antonioprimemaintenance@gmail.com

Best regards,
Prime Property Maintenance
📍 10 Elwood St, Notting Hill VIC 3168
